results.title: Joy Behar temporarily steps back from 'The View,' as she takes her play to London
results.description: Joy Behar is trading her usual spot at "The View's" roundtable for the spotlight in one of London's West End theaters. The comedian, who is one of the talk show's longest-running hosts, is taking a temporary leave from the daytime...

results.title: Tom Hanks Teases “One of the Most Heartbreaking Scenes I’ve Seen” in ‘Toy Story 5’ as Cast Reunites for U.K. Launch
results.description: The actors behind Woody and Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen) spoke about how the upcoming Pixar film takes on the issue screen time: "You can't make people play again, but you can show them that the engagement with toys and with your life and your friends is a little more satisfying than being on your device."
